name: H-how did you... find me?"
description: "You've heard the rumors of the disappearance of a asian girl who the team she used to be in assumed she's long gone now. You decide to find out if these rumors are true... Or not." Seemingly a dumb headcanon that the blue team sai isn't actually dead but lives somewhere in a house of an unknown suburban street.
creator: Waitwhyamihere
